title: post api dub with valid file and target language
description: Verify that POST /api/dub with a valid uploaded media file and target_language returns 200 status with JSON containing srt captions and base64-encoded mp3 dubbed audio.

title: post api dub with missing parameters
description: Verify that POST /api/dub with missing file or missing target_language returns 400 status with error message "Missing parameters".

title: post api dub with third party api failure
description: Verify that POST /api/dub with valid inputs but missing third-party API keys or external call failure returns 500 status with appropriate processing error message.

title: post api mux with valid video and audio
description: Verify that POST /api/mux with multipart original_video file and dubbed_audio file returns 200 status with video/mp4 stream containing the muxed MP4.

title: post api mux with missing video or audio
description: Verify that POST /api/mux with missing video or audio parameters returns 400 status with error message "Missing video or audio file".

title: post api mux with ffmpeg execution failure
description: Verify that POST /api/mux with valid inputs on a host without ffmpeg binary or with ffmpeg execution failure returns 500 status with error message "ffmpeg or file processing error".

title: post api tts preview with valid text and voice
description: Verify that POST /api/tts-preview with valid JSON containing text and voice returns 200 status with audio/mpeg stream of synthesized preview audio.

title: post api tts preview with missing parameters
description: Verify that POST /api/tts-preview with missing text or voice parameters returns 400 status with error message "Missing parameters".

title: post api tts preview with synthesis failure
description: Verify that POST /api/tts-preview with valid payload but missing third-party TTS API key or synthesis failure returns 500 status with error message "Missing API key or synthesis error".
